message:
feat(search): implement ms search command with hybrid search

- Add full search.rs with hybrid (BM25+semantic+RRF), bm25-only, and
  semantic-only search modes
- Integrate SearchFilters for --tags, --layer, --min-quality,
  --include-deprecated filtering
- Add --snippets flag for showing matching content snippets
- Support both human-friendly and robot JSON output modes
- Refactor filters.rs for cleaner post-fusion filtering
- Update mod.rs exports for new filter functions
- Fix frequency variable shadowing in cass/mining.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
